positive.stdout:

    ~in_top_10(fifa_22)).

cnf(u15,axiom,
    japanese_game_company(sK0)).

    japanese_game_company(sK1(X0)) | ~in_top_10(X0)).

cnf(u14,axiom,
    created_by(sK0,legend_of_zelda)).

cnf(u16,axiom,
    created_by(sK1(X0),X0) | ~in_top_10(X0)).

cnf(u19,axiom,
    sold_over_one_million(legend_of_zelda)).

cnf(u18,axiom,
    ~sold_over_one_million(X0) | in_top_10(X0)).

cnf(u21,axiom,
    in_top_10(legend_of_zelda)).
